queries.question: For every diagnostic center, what are the corresponding test names?
queries.sql: select diagnostic_centers.name , tests.testname from Diagnostic_Centers_Tests join Tests on Diagnostic_Centers_Tests.TestTypeID = Tests.TestTypeID join Diagnostic_Centers on Diagnostic_Centers_Tests.DiagnosticCenterID = Diagnostic_Centers.CenterID
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?testname WHERE {
  ?diagnostic_centers_tests a :Diagnostic_Centers_Tests .
  ?tests a :Tests .
  ?diagnostic_centers_tests p:hasTests ?tests .
  ?diagnostic_centers a :Diagnostic_Centers .
  ?diagnostic_centers_tests p:hasDiagnostic_Centers ?diagnostic_centers .
  ?diagnostic_centers p:name ?name .
  ?tests p:TestName ?testname .
}

queries.question: Which test names are associated with every diagnostic center?
queries.sql: SELECT Tests.TestName  from Diagnostic_Centers_Tests join Tests on Diagnostic_Centers_Tests.TestTypeID = Tests.TestTypeID join Diagnostic_Centers on Diagnostic_Centers_Tests.DiagnosticCenterID = Diagnostic_Centers.CenterID   GROUP BY Diagnostic_Centers_Tests.TestTypeID HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Diagnostic_Centers_Tests.DiagnosticCenterID) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Diagnostic_Centers)

ambiguous_dsl.question: Which test names are associated with every diagnostic center?
